artifacts.source: public GenBio artifact if available; exact file must be recorded before use
precomputed scFoundation cell-state embedding or approved encoder output
STRING official network API v12.0 stable endpoint https://version-12-0.string-db.org/api/tsv/network; built by scripts/build_k562_string_graph.py
artifacts.filtering_rule: Map K562 perturbation and target gene symbols to STRING protein IDs, query the official STRING v12.0 network API for the union, keep induced-subgraph edges where both endpoints map back to K562 genes and combined score >= 0.4.

artifacts.source: Reactome official GMT download aligned to exact K562 target genes; built by scripts/build_k562_pathway_membership.py
artifacts.species_filter: Homo sapiens pathways only, identified by R-HSA stable IDs
artifacts.filtering_rule: Keep pathways with at least 2 genes overlapping the exact K562 target-gene list.

artifacts.source: Exact AutoModel directory expected by public VCHarness node code; not equivalent to downloaded h5ad embedding.
Exact model directory expected by public VCHarness node code; not equivalent to STRING graph edge file.
VCHarness public K562 static node code bundled in genbio-ai/VCHarness

artifact_constrained_blueprint_exclusion.main_run_policy: source-backed artifacts only; proven-unavailable artifact-dependent blueprints are excluded from training and reported separately

official_string_gnn_model_dir.reason: Public genbio-ai/STRING_GNN repository exposes no source-backed model weights/config through the Hugging Face API; graph TSV/H5AD artifacts are not an equivalent model directory.
official_string_gnn_model_dir.policy: exclude dependent blueprints from the main full run and report separately; no fallback/proxy training
evidence: configs/artifacts/acquisition_sources.json documents the unavailable public STRING_GNN model-dir source
docs/GENERIC_CELLLINE_TRANSFER_RUNBOOK.md requires proving or blocking official_string_gnn_model_dir rather than substituting graph files
docs/OFFICIAL_MODEL_DIR_ACQUISITION.md distinguishes STRING graph/embedding artifacts from /home/Models/STRING_GNN
